leadText: Hydro Steam (Japanese: ハイドロスチーム Hydro Steam) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced during Generation IX. It is the signature move of Walking Wake.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Hydro Steam inflicts damage. If used under harsh sunlight , it receives a 50% damage boost, unlike all other Water-type moves, which would receive a 50% damage reduction in harsh sunlight instead. If used by a Pokémon holding a Utility Umbrella during harsh sunlight, it does not receive the 50% damage boost, instead being affected by the standard 50% damage reduction for Water-type moves.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user blasts the target with boiling-hot water. This move's power is not lowered in harsh sunlight but rather boosted by 50 percent.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Hydro Steam is the only non- Fire-type move to benefit from a power boost from harsh sunlight .
